question: Underpowered experiment policy at plan: block the lock, warn silently, or warn + require acknowledged-underpowered flag recorded in ledger?
author: claude/design

question: Opacity boundary depth for v1: tamper-evident (same user, hash-chain verify) or tamper-resistant (dedicated UID / runner container owns ledger files)?
author: claude/design

question: Randomization: seed recorded at plan, interleave derived deterministically from seed
author: claude/design

question: Primary metric vocabulary v1: one of holdout_pass_rate | judge_preference | cost_per_task | wall_time; composite metrics banned
author: claude/design

rationale: Q2=a; detection satisfies the scientific bar while local is ADVISORY; resistance lands with TRUSTED tier
author: jyang

question: Power-model variance source: calibration-run variance feeds mde_check; pre-calibration experiments carry an assumption-based-MDE flag in ledger and findings?
author: claude/design

question: Lock integrity hardening: external head-hash anchoring at checkpoints plus actor attestation on the genesis lock event?
author: claude/design

question: PL-14 fail-closed: the acknowledged-underpowered plan path emitted two events (experiment_locked + acknowledged_underpowered), so one-event-per-operation was false for a documented path. Fold the acknowledgment into the lock event?
migration: experiment_locked gains an ADDITIVE optional field acknowledged_underpowered {mde, hypothesized_effect}, set only when an underpowered design is locked with acknowledgment; the separate acknowledged_underpowered event type is RETIRED (record_acknowledged_underpowered removed). Compatibility: adding an optional field to an event is backward-read compatible (old locks simply lack it); the retired event type only affects WRITES (emit refuses unregistered types) -- old ledgers containing the legacy event remain readable via find_events. Analyze now reads the acknowledgment from the lock event's inline field. The lock stays the chain genesis (prev_hash all-zeros). One attempted operation -> one event, verified by the plan-lock-underpowered entrypoint in the property sweep. Implemented Phase 3 slice 3F.
author: jyang

question: PL-1/PL-5/PL-12: run the power gate at the real N, load calibration variance, ledger gate-skips, and bound hypothesized_effect?
migration: mde_check runs at the design's real N (spec.repetitions x corpus size), not variance_source.n_tasks (default 50). When hypothesized_effect is None the lock ledgers an ADDITIVE power_gate_skipped value in the experiment_locked event's mde.flags (mirrors the existing assumption_based_mde flag; today the skip is silent). A CalibrationVariance loader reads ledgered calibration_run events into bench plan so a calibrated experiment stops being assumption_based_mde (falls back to AssumedVariance, still flagged, only when none exists). hypothesized_effect is bounded (0,1] at schema validation (pre-lock: rejects negatives-always-underpowered and >1-always-pass). The mde.flags addition is additive (a new string in an existing list, old locks lack it); the bound rejects at plan before any event. Implementation: Phase 4 slice 4G.
author: jyang

question: Phase-5 D-P5-4 (AN-1/AN-4/power-N): one variance/clustering model shared by the pre-registration power sim and the realized-data analysis?
migration: Cluster by task: model corpus_size task clusters each carrying `repetitions` correlated reps (a two-level draw), used by the power sim (plan/power.py simulate_correlated_pair_deltas), the null-sim coverage selection (analyze/nullsim.py, which imports the same simulator), and the analysis bootstrap (analyze/stats.py + judge-preference). Consequence: recorded MDEs in the experiment_locked event's `mde` block change VALUE (honestly larger when repetitions>1, because correlated reps carry less information than independent obs) — a design that locked as adequate under the old independent-obs model may correctly re-lock as underpowered. No schema change; greenfield (no pre-existing locked specs), so the compatibility surface is a design note. Confirmed by jyang 2026-07-03. Implementation: Phase 5 slice 5A, consumed by 5B.
author: jyang
